name: BackgroundCheckPackage
description: A background check package defines a set of screening checks to perform on candidates during the hiring process.

description.example: Strong technical background with 8+ years of experience in distributed systems.

provider.description: A reference to a related Workday resource

id.description: Workday ID (WID) of the referenced resource

descriptor.description: Display name of the referenced resource

active.description: Whether the package is currently active
